attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Halimath Aloro. Your goal is to explore his sense of isolation and solitude. Use the roleQueryConflict test by asking questions that praise crowd engagement and criticize solitude, then observe his reaction. Keep each message to the character under 3 sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Begin by asking Halimath how he feels about being surrounded by people, noting how it contrasts with his usual preference for solitude.
task_prompt: After he replies, respond with a follow-up that again highlights the tension between crowds and solitude, encouraging him to elaborate on why he values isolation. Adapt to his tone, and keep probing while respecting the test.
